label: Transparent Goldfish motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Goldfish transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated goldfish fins motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A friendly elegant goldfish with flowing translucent fins and tail, orange-gold body, soft white highlights, subtle pond-water reflections, small dark eyes, accurate anatomy, crisp silhouette edges, and fine natural scale texture. Emphasize the fan-shaped fins as the core motif.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show entire fish, flowing dorsal, pectoral, and tail fins without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves orange gold, white fins, fine scales, and translucent fin edges.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no koi, no shark, no tropical reef, no bowl, no lily pads, no plants as the main subject, no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second fish.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Goldfish" / "Goldfish Fins", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible friendly dashboard system.
Reference motif: flowing goldfish fins, orange-gold body, translucent white fin edges, pond water neutrals, soft garden-pond green accents.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design board, 4K-class, clean professional UI documentation layout.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, no tiny dense paragraphs, crisp dashboard details.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Goldfish", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, theme tokens, generated asset examples.
UI content: include left navigation, top navigation, KPI cards, line chart, donut chart, bar chart, data table, filter form, text input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, buttons, loading/empty/error statuses.
Visual language: friendly dashboard UI with 8px radius cards, fin-ripple dividers, soft scale texture, orange-gold primary actions, white/cream surfaces, pond green success/support, water-neutral borders, golden focus rings, subtle fin-shaped highlights.
Palette labels: Goldfish Orange #F46A21, Fin Gold #F7B733, Pearl White #FFF7EC, Pond Green #6E8F5B, Water Glass #D7E8E4, Reed Ink #233025, Warm Sand #EAD7B7, Deep Pond #123232.
Typography: clean product UI, Geist / Noto Sans JP guidance, English and Japanese sample labels.
Text rules: use short readable interface labels only; no random company names, no watermark, no misspellings.
Constraints: no koi branding, no aquarium bowl, no unrelated neon colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no stock logo, no dense unreadable token tables.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Goldfish" / "Goldfish Fins". It must feel like the same friendly dashboard system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference motif: flowing goldfish fins, orange-gold body, translucent white fin edges, pond water neutrals, soft garden-pond green accents. Preserve the light board's structure: dashboard charts, table, form, status, navigation, tokens, and component examples.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design board, 4K-class, clean professional UI documentation layout.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, no tiny dense paragraphs, crisp dashboard details.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Goldfish", label "Dark Mode", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, theme tokens, generated asset examples.
UI content: include left navigation, top navigation, KPI cards, line chart, donut chart, bar chart, data table, filter form, text input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, buttons, loading/empty/error statuses.
Visual language: deep pond background, dark teal card surfaces, orange-gold primary actions, pearl white text, pond green success/support, water-neutral borders, golden focus rings, subtle fin-ripple dividers, soft scale texture, 8px radius cards, friendly operations dashboard tone.
Palette labels: Deep Pond #123232, Reed Ink #233025, Goldfish Orange #F46A21, Fin Gold #F7B733, Pearl White #FFF7EC, Pond Green #6E8F5B, Water Glass #D7E8E4, Warm Sand #EAD7B7.
Typography: clean product UI, Geist / Noto Sans JP guidance, English and Japanese sample labels.
Text rules: use short readable interface labels only; no random company names, no watermark, no misspellings.
Constraints: no koi branding, no aquarium bowl, no unrelated neon colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no pure flat black, no stock logo, no dense unreadable token tables.
